title: 3D Generation with Hunyuan3D-2.1
name: hunyuan3d-2
setup: cd ~/hunyuan3d-2 && git clone https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/Hunyuan3D-2.1.git Hunyuan3D-2.1 && cd Hunyuan3D-2.1 && pip install torch==2.5.1 torchvision==0.20.1 torchaudio==2.5.1 --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu124 && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd hy3dpaint/custom_rasterizer && pip install -e . && cd ../../DifferentiableRenderer && bash compile_mesh_painter.sh && cd ../.. && wget https://github.com/xinntao/Real-ESRGAN/releases/download/v0.1.0/RealESRGAN_x4plus.pth -P hy3dpaint/ckpt
description: Generate high-fidelity 3D assets from images using Hunyuan3D-2.1 (Image-to-3D and Text-to-3D)

mode.title: Generation Mode
mode.description: image2text generates 3D from an input image. Text-to-3D coming soon.
